evals.prompt: Sign my driver. The inf file is at D:\project-falcon\driver\falcon.inf. Use the default certificate.
evals.expected_output: Claude runs sign_driver.ps1 with -InfPath pointing to falcon.inf and default PFX/password, reports the path of the signed .cat file.

evals.prompt: Generate a catalog file and sign it. My driver inf is C:\drivers\myusb\myusb.inf. The signing cert is at C:\certs\MyCompany.pfx and the password is s3cr3t.
evals.expected_output: Claude runs sign_driver.ps1 with the custom PFX path and password, reports success and .cat path.

evals.prompt: I need to sign the driver at .\src\drv\filter.inf for test signing purposes. The tools aren't in my PATH but I have WDK installed.
evals.expected_output: Claude runs sign_driver.ps1 which searches under C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\ for Inf2Cat and signtool, then completes the signing workflow.
